meta.title: Smart Recovery Center Case Study | WEI LAN
meta.description: Review the WEI LAN resource recovery center reference with digital cockpit, including sorting modules, site workflow, project background, and video reference.

pageTitle: Resource recovery center with digital cockpit
bodyHtml:
Smart Recovery Reference

Digital recovery workflow reference

Reference for a resource recovery center that combines sorting modules, weighing, reporting, and remote operating visibility.

System Workflow

Reference scope connects receiving, sorting, weighing, and reporting in one workflow

The case is ordered by project review sequence: background, cooperation unit, constraints, solution, and before/after comparison.

01

Project background

Mixed-stream operating context

The center combines receiving, material staging, sorting, weighing, storage, and outbound logistics for mixed recyclable and municipal waste streams.

Workflow zones
6 zonesreceive to outbound
Material scope
2 streamsrecyclables and municipal waste
02

Cooperation unit

City-level service operation

The cooperation unit needed better visibility across incoming material, sorted output, daily operating status, and reporting for management review.

Management layer
1 cockpitcentral operating display
Review mode
dailyoutput and status reports
03

Real constraints

Synchronized material and data flow

The project had to connect sorting modules, weighing points, cockpit display, storage zones, and remote management without separating operations from reporting.

Data points
3 groupsinput / output / status
Remote need
1 interfacemanagement visibility
04

Solution

Integrated sorting and cockpit scope

The reference package covers sorting modules, intelligent weighing points, cockpit display, remote management interface, and reporting support for throughput and categories.

System blocks
4 blockssort / weigh / report / manage
Output view
1 dashboardcockpit summary
05

Before / after comparison

Visible operation records

BeforeSeparated material flow and reports

Managers had limited visibility into how receiving, sorting, and storage connected day to day.

AfterVisible route from receiving to reporting

The reference video and cockpit screenshots show the material route, sorted output, and reporting workflow together.

Evidence set
2 assetsvideo and cockpit screenshots
Request Reference Package Back to Case Studies
